top_signals.title: Tesco fuel sales boom after Iran war inflates petrol prices
top_signals.summary: Tesco has revealed a nearly 20 per cent boost in fuel sales as the Iran war sends petrol prices soaring, driving growing revenue. The FTSE 100 supermarket saw fuel sales jump by 19.5 per cent to £1.7bn in the three months to May, while sales excluding fuel edged up by two per cent to £12.6bn. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Anthropic Ban Forces Investor Rethink of Political Risk
top_signals.summary: Investors in the ever-hotter AI stock rally must suddenly consider a risk with the potential to be even more damaging than high valuations and big spending: What happens if politics gets in the way?
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ryan Salame’s wife to face charges over FTX-funded congressional run
top_signals.summary: A federal judge has denied a bid from Michelle Bond, the wife of former FTX executive Ryan Salame, to have campaign finance charges against her dismissed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Morgan Stanley, Temasek Set for Big Pay Day From NSE’s India IPO
top_signals.summary: The National Stock Exchange of India Ltd.’s planned initial public offering is set to unlock the value of long-term investments for a group of backers including Morgan Stanley, Temasek Holdings Pte. and State Bank of India.

top_signals.title: HSBC coughs up $25m over Australian scam failures
top_signals.summary: HSBC has agreed to cough up just shy of $25m after admitting to failures in protecting customers in Australia from scammers. The Australian arm of Europe’s biggest lender was investigated by the watchdog over alleged “widespread and systematic failures” to shield its customers targeted by fraudsters.  The Australian Securities and Investments Commission (ASIC) said it [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
